Author: 246tnt
Content:
Is that layer necessary ? What does it do exactly ?
Because I can draw a thin gate nmos (i.e. without the `DualGate` layer) without `LVPWELL` and it doesn't seem to change how it's extracted and it doesn't violate DRC either.

Author: bailey8889
Content: I believe `LVPWELL` is used inside deep nwells to create an isolated pwell for nmos with bulk connections other than ground.

Author: 246tnt
Content: Ok, so when outside deep-nwell it doesn't matter. Good to know ! Tx.
